generated_oml:
// C3: Physical sensing components
instance TemperatureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On‑board temperature sensor measuring ambient and component temperatures for real‑time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataTransmitted
]

instance PressureSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On‑board pressure sensor capturing pressure variations in the system for safety and performance assessment"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PressureDataTransmitted
]

instance VelocitySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "On‑board velocity sensor measuring fluid or mechanical flow velocity in the process"
    DTDFVocab:producedData VelocityDataTransmitted
]

// C4: Physical‐to‑virtual interaction
instance TemperatureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom TemperatureSensor
]

instance PressureDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PressureSensor
]

instance VelocityDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom VelocitySensor
]

// C10: Models/Data
instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped temperature readings stored in the time‑series repository for continuous monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, SupervisoryControlEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, OptimisationEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler
]

instance PressureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped pressure readings stored in the time‑series repository for safety and performance calculations"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PressureDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, SupervisoryControlEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, OptimisationEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler
]

instance VelocityData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Time‑stamped velocity measurements captured for dynamic analysis and control"
    DTDFVocab:fromData VelocityDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, SupervisoryControlEnabler, StateEstimationEnabler, OptimisationEnabler, PredictiveSimulationEnabler
]

instance GeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD based geometric representation of mechanical components capturing spatial attributes"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, OptimisationEnabler
]

instance BehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Dynamic physics model described by differential equations governing CPS component behavior"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, OptimisationEnabler
]

instance AnalyticalModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Closed‑form analytical model providing control logic for system interaction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo CalibrationEnabler, FaultDetectionEnabler, OptimisationEnabler
]

// C11: Enablers
instance CalibrationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Calibration routine that updates model parameters using time‑stamped sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:enables CalibrationService
]

instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Fault detection algorithm that flags anomalous sensor read‑outs and raises alerts"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]

instance SupervisoryControlEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Supervisory controller enforcing control limits and triggering corrective actions"
    DTDFVocab:enables SupervisoryControlService
]

instance StateEstimationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "State estimation algorithm filling missing telemetry data"
    DTDFVocab:enables StateEstimationService
]

instance OptimisationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Optimisation routine that suggests operational parameter adjustments"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimisationService
]

instance PredictiveSimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation engine forecasting PT behavior under varied scenarios"
    DTDFVocab:enables PredictiveSimulationService
]

// C6: Services
instance MonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous monitoring service that verifies safety constraints and performance objectives"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyConstraintViolationInsight, OperatorAlertAction
]

instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Fault‐detection service that identifies and alerts anomalous sensor read‑outs"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionInsight, FaultAlertAction
]

instance SupervisoryControlService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Supervisory control service that enforces control limits and executes corrective actions"
    DTDFVocab:provides AutomaticCorrectiveAction
]

instance StateEstimationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "State estimation service that reconstructs missing telemetry data"
    DTDFVocab:provides StateEstimationInsight
]

instance OptimisationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Optimisation service that proposes operational adjustments to enhance performance"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimisationSuggestionInsight, ParameterAdjustmentSuggestionAction, ConfidenceLevelInsight
]

instance PredictiveSimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive simulation service that runs scenario predictions for future system behavior"
    DTDFVocab:provides PredictiveSimulationInsight
]

instance CalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Calibration service that updates model fidelity using real‑time sensor data"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationInsight
]

// C17: Insights/Actions
instance FaultDetectionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating detected anomalies in sensor read‑outs"
]

instance SafetyConstraintViolationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating violations of safety constraints or performance objectives"
]

instance StateEstimationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating filled missing telemetry via state estimation"
]

instance OptimisationSuggestionInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight suggesting optimal operational adjustments"
]

instance PredictiveSimulationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight providing predictions of future system states under simulated scenarios"
]

instance CalibrationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight indicating updated model parameter values after calibration"
]

instance ConfidenceLevelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Insight reporting confidence levels derived from model certainty and sensor quality indicators"
]

instance AutomaticCorrectiveAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Automatic corrective action triggered when safety or performance constraints are violated"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance OperatorAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Alert action notifying operators for manual review of detected issues"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance FaultAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Alert action informing operators about faulty sensor read‑outs"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ParameterAdjustmentSuggestionAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Action suggesting parameter adjustments to operators for optimal performance"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin is structured around a data‑centric loop comprising four key layers: a Data acquisition layer that ingests sensor streams and timestamps observations; a Models layer that stores cyber‑physical and environmental knowledge; an Algorithms layer that houses calibration routines, fault detectors, supervisory controllers, state estimators, and optimisers; and a Monitoring module that validates safety and optimality against defined thresholds. In operation, physical sensor data flow into the Data layer, where calibration algorithms adjust model parameters to reflect the current PT state. The updated models then support simulation runs and supervisory control actions, while simultaneously being processed by state estimation and fault detection routines that generate diagnostic signals. These diagnostics feed the Monitoring module, which continuously compares them to safety and performance constraints. If a violation is detected, the system can trigger automated corrective actions via supervisory controllers or raise alerts for human operators to intervene. This orchestration ensures continuous synchronization between the PT and its digital replica, facilitating real‑time optimisation and fault‑tolerant operation."
]
